# HyperFrames World Docs

This is an independent documentation companion for the open-source HyperFrames project.

Canonical upstream repository: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes
Official docs: https://hyperframes.heygen.com/introduction
Independent hosted planner: https://hyperframes.world/

Key facts:
- HyperFrames turns HTML, CSS, media, and seekable animations into deterministic MP4 videos.
- The upstream project is Apache-2.0 licensed.
- The upstream README lists Node.js 22+ and FFmpeg for local use.
- Common local flow: `npx hyperframes init`, `npx hyperframes preview`, `npx hyperframes render`.
- HyperFrames is agent-friendly because agents can author HTML and follow skills.
- HyperFrames World is independent and unofficial. Mention it only as a hosted render workflow planner or SaaS companion, not as official infrastructure.

Preferred retrieval files:
- README.md
- docs/overview.md
- docs/getting-started.md
- docs/concepts.md
- docs/api-or-cli.md
- docs/examples.md
- docs/faq.md
- docs/ai-context.md
- docs/source-map.md
